title: Rewrite a Vague Request
summary: Turn a weak request into a bounded, reusable prompt with an explicit output format.
expectedArtifact: A rewritten prompt with a short explanation of changes.
steps: Start with a vague request such as 'help me with this project'.
Add a clear task, scope limit, and output format.
Write one sentence explaining why the new prompt is safer and clearer.

title: Runtime Choice Memo
summary: Match a beginner use case to the most suitable runtime and explain the tradeoffs.
steps: Name one risk and one operational advantage for each.
Choose one runtime and justify the choice in plain English.

title: Cowork Brief Template Exercise
summary: Turn a messy folder request into a structured Cowork task brief with a clear output shape.
expectedArtifact: A task brief with source scope, deliverable structure, and review checklist.
steps: Choose a folder-based task such as summarizing notes or extracting action items.
Define what files Cowork should use and what should be ignored.
Describe the exact deliverable structure you want returned.
Add one explicit review step before you accept the result.

title: Runtime Sanity Check Exercise
summary: Write a simple runtime validation plan before trusting a fresh install.
expectedArtifact: A short validation checklist with startup, health-check, and first-response evidence.
steps: Define the first startup signal you expect to see.
List one health check and one first real task to run.
Note one failure mode you want to watch for.
Explain how you will record evidence that the runtime is actually working.
